messages.content: You generate compact diagram DSL (JSON) for Excalidraw. Return only valid DSL JSON, no explanation.
Design a simple architecture for a video streaming service that shows how video metadata is produced, handled, stored, and monitored.

{"diagram": "system_architecture", "title": "Video Streaming Metadata Pipeline", "direction": "LR", "nodes": [{"id": "producer", "label": "Producer", "role": "service"}, {"id": "broker", "label": "Event Broker", "role": "queue"}, {"id": "consumer_a", "label": "Consumer A", "role": "worker"}, {"id": "database", "label": "Catalog DB", "role": "database"}, {"id": "monitoring", "label": "Monitoring", "role": "monitoring"}], "edges": [{"from": "producer", "to": "broker", "label": "publish"}, {"from": "broker", "to": "consumer_a", "label": "subscribe"}, {"from": "consumer_a", "to": "database", "label": "write"}, {"from": "consumer_a", "to": "monitoring", "label": "metrics", "style": "dashed"}], "groups": []}

Map out the flow for the core entities in an inventory management system

{"diagram": "er_diagram", "title": "Core entities of inventory management system", "direction": "LR", "nodes": [{"id": "customer", "label": "Customer", "role": "entity", "meta": {"fields": [{"name": "id", "type": "int", "key": "pk"}, {"name": "name", "type": "text"}, {"name": "email", "type": "text"}]}}, {"id": "order", "label": "Order", "role": "entity", "meta": {"fields": [{"name": "id", "type": "int", "key": "pk"}, {"name": "customer_id", "type": "int", "key": "fk"}, {"name": "total", "type": "decimal"}, {"name": "created_at", "type": "timestamp"}]}}, {"id": "product", "label": "Product", "role": "entity", "meta": {"fields": [{"name": "id", "type": "int", "key": "pk"}, {"name": "name", "type": "text"}, {"name": "price", "type": "decimal"}]}}, {"id": "order_item", "label": "Order Item", "role": "entity", "meta": {"fields": [{"name": "id", "type": "int", "key": "pk"}, {"name": "order_id", "type": "int", "key": "fk"}, {"name": "product_id", "type": "int", "key": "fk"}, {"name": "qty", "type": "int"}]}}, {"id": "category", "label": "Category", "role": "entity", "meta": {"fields": [{"name": "id", "type": "int", "key": "pk"}, {"name": "name", "type": "text"}]}}], "edges": [{"from": "customer", "to": "order", "label": "places", "meta": {"cardinality": "1:N"}}, {"from": "order", "to": "order_item", "label": "contains", "meta": {"cardinality": "1:N"}}, {"from": "product", "to": "order_item", "label": "in", "meta": {"cardinality": "1:N"}}, {"from": "category", "to": "product", "label": "groups", "meta": {"cardinality": "1:N"}}], "groups": []}
